user.title: ICS Calendar Tools
user.description: Registers services to list, add, update, delete, and import events in Local Calendar (.ics) calendars.

list_events.name: List events from Local Calendar .ics
list_events.description: Return events for a Local Calendar, including UID values.

start.name: Start
start.description: Only include events that overlap this datetime/date.

end.name: End
end.description: Only include events that start before this datetime/date.

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of events to return.

add_event.name: Add event to Local Calendar .ics
add_event.description: Add an event to a Local Calendar .ics file.

all_day.name: All day
all_day.description: Create an all-day event when enabled.

update_event.name: Update event in Local Calendar .ics
update_event.description: Update a Local Calendar event identified by UID.

uid.name: UID
uid.description: UID of the event to update.

delete_event.name: Delete event from Local Calendar .ics
delete_event.description: Delete a Local Calendar event by UID or fallback matchers.

uid.name: UID
uid.description: UID of the event to delete (preferred).

import_events.name: Import events into Local Calendar .ics
import_events.description: Validate pasted ICS content, optionally clear the selected Local Calendar, and import the events.

ics.name: ICS file content
ics.description: Full ICS file content to import.
